title: lasiopetalum erectifolium
intro: Lasiopetalum erectifolium, also known as the upright horsejeans, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cunoniaceae. It has been traditionally used in Australian indigenous medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lasiopetalum erectifolium include relief from pain, reduction of inflammation, and potential antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into a tea or infused oil, which can be used topically or internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
